theme.description: Premium modern business website for DCX Security Systems. Deep dark space theme with high-tech neon blue highlights, dark blue primary brand colors, and clean glassmorphism surfaces to communicate advanced technology, trust, and security.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-white
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white

buttons.primary: bg-blue-900 text-white border border-[#00E5FF]/30 font-semibold hover:bg-blue-800 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.4)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-[#00E5FF] hover:text-[#00E5FF] transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-3

cards.glassmorphism: bg-[#0A0D15]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 hover:border-[#00E5FF]/50 hover:shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,229,255,0.15)] transition-all duration-500 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden relative group

navbar.style: fixed w-full top-0 z-50 bg-[#05070C]/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/5

floating_buttons.whatsapp: fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(37,211,102,0.3)] hover:scale-110 transition-transform
floating_buttons.call: fixed bottom-24 right-6 z-50 bg-blue-600 text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(37,99,235,0.3)] hover:scale-110 transition-transform hover:shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.5)]

motion_and_animations.scroll_animations: Use Framer Motion's whileInView for fading up sections and triggering animated counters.

hero.description: Abstract dark tech space background for hero section

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Build a multi-page premium marketing website using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Apply glassmorphism on cards and dark neon theme exactly as defined.
instructions_to_main_agent.routing: Create independent pages or a seamless single-page application with scroll spy navigation for Home, About, Products, Services, Installations, Clients, Contact.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout_details: Implement a sticky navbar with the DCX logo. Ensure seamless page transitions. Add floating WhatsApp and Call buttons on the bottom right.

sections.home: Include a premium hero with motion effects, statistics counters (1500+ Installations, 300+ Clients, etc.), product highlights, and client testimonials.
sections.products: Display 12 security products (sensors, cameras, hubs) using the defined glassmorphism cards. Include a product image, price/specs, features, and an 'Enquiry' button per card. Use Framer motion hover effects.
sections.services: Display 6 service cards with an icon and description representing Home Security, Office Security, Commercial Security, Fire Safety & Surveillance.
sections.installations: Create an image gallery using the installation_gallery placeholder URLs with hover zoom effects.
sections.clients: Client testimonials slider with ratings and avatars.
sections.contact: Include an embedded Google Maps iframe, frontend-only forms (contact/quote/enquiry), and FAQ accordion.

instructions_to_main_agent.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
